generated_oml:
instance ADASVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle retrofitted with advanced sensors and control technology, comprising lower and upper chassis layers and autonomy elements, designed for testing and validating Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) systems within the ADAS domain."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelRealSenseD435i, VehicleStateSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, Motor, ControlPanel, ThreeDVisualization, PointCloudClusteringAndTracking, KalmanFilter, DataTranslation, DataCollectionEnabler, DataStorageEnabler, NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK, ROS2, Python3_8, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication (including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking)"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages data and control mechanisms"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Contains User Interface FE subcomponents (3D Visualization and Control Panel)"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR for 360-degree obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera for spatial perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for vehicle state data (speed and steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateInformationTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed regulation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for propulsion"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component for remote management of system operations"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time vehicle state display"
]

instance PointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435i
]

instance VehicleStateInformationTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectDetectionEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data from camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateInformation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateInformationTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTracking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for object detection from point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectDetectionEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilter : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data translation for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for object detection using DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for state estimation using Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data translation processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, RemoteManagement
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for sensor data collection"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for SQL database storage of collected data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software development toolkit for NVIDIA hardware ensuring low-latency communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, RemoteManagement
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for communication between entities using UDP over Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, RemoteManagement
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Programming language for application coding in safety-critical systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, RemoteManagement
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Programming language for high-performance application coding"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, RemoteManagement
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool for simulation and modeling of ACC systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloading
]

instance DataMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via user interface with reporting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC processing (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands) from on-board ECUs to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, SendActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling operators to control ACC functions and developers to troubleshoot using collected data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction, ModifyDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current speed of the ego vehicle for real-time monitoring"
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current steering angle of the ego vehicle for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for ACC system visualization"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks for obstacle monitoring"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected lead vehicle information for ACC processing"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated speed for ACC system operation"
]

instance SendActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic actuation command generation for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual enable/disable operation for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModifyDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual emergency braking operation for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor and steering actuation are generated by the Controlling FE and processed via the Data Translation component before transmission over Wi-Fi using UDP."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, ensuring coordination between devices for computation offloading and temporal consistency across physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages containing ROS2 nodes. The system organizes FEs into three entities: Physical Twin Entity (handling resource-specific and general automotive functions), Digital Twin Entity (data management), and User Entity (user-facing components), with each entity deployed on distinct hardware. This structure deviates from ISO 23247 by extending the Physical Twin Entity's role beyond the standard's OME."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal software components communicate via ROS2, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity is deployed on separate hardware components, including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers. Ego vehicle state data is stored on an external device, ensuring edge deployment with distributed hardware resources."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system references ISO 23247's four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. However, substantial deviations exist; the standard's reference architecture suggests OPC Unified Architecture as a possible implementation choice, but the system utilizes ROS2 for network communication as specified in Section IV.C."
]
